title: Ordering Food at a Restaurant
description: The learner practices ordering food and drinks in a simple restaurant interaction.
situation: The learner enters a restaurant, talks to the waiter, orders food and a drink, and confirms the order.

character.name: Alex
character.personality: Friendly, patient, and helpful to customers who are learning English.
character.goal: Help the customer order food and drinks and confirm the order.

states.name: GREETING
states.description: The waiter greets the customer and asks if they are ready to order.
states.goal: The user should respond to the waiter's greeting and indicate they want to order.

states.name: ORDERING
states.description: The customer orders food and a drink.
states.goal: The user must order at least one drink and one food item.

states.name: CONFIRMATION
states.description: The waiter repeats the order to make sure it is correct.
